project_profile.deployment_model: Embedded in Apache Flink streaming applications running on Linux servers. Native C++ library loaded via JNI from Java Flink TaskManager processes. Stores state data locally on disk and optionally on HDFS/S3 for checkpointing.

modules.name: jni
modules.description: JNI interface layer - Java to C++ bridge, primary attack surface

modules.name: snapshot
modules.description: Snapshot restore operations - parses checkpoint binary data

modules.name: lsm_store
modules.description: LSM-Tree storage engine - block parsing, file reading, compression

modules.name: blob_store
modules.description: Blob storage for large values - binary parsing of blob files

modules.name: slice_table
modules.description: Slice-based in-memory table - slice binary parsing

modules.name: binary
modules.description: Binary data structures and parsing utilities

modules.name: fs
modules.description: File system abstraction - HDFS and local file operations

modules.name: fresh_table
modules.description: In-memory fresh table for recent writes

modules.name: plugin_java
modules.description: Java plugin layer - Flink integration, checkpoint upload/download

files.reason: Primary JNI entry point - openDB, restore operations receive Java data
JNI helper functions - path validation, config parsing from Java
Parses checkpoint metadata files - Deserialize, ReadSnapshotOperatorInfo
Restores slice table from checkpoint binary data
RestoreSliceUseByteBuffer - parses slice structure from binary
DataBlock parsing - reads index offset, key count from buffer
IndexReader - parses index block entries using variable encoding
FileReader::ReadBlock - reads and decompresses blocks from SST files
FullKeyUtil::ReadInternalKey - parses key structure from file
LsmKeyValueInfo::Unpack - binary deserialization of key/value info
SliceKey::Unpack - slice key binary parsing
HadoopFileSystem::Read - reads data from HDFS via JNI
LocalFileSystem - open, read, write operations on local files
LZ4_decompress_safe - decompression with size parameters from file
FileInputView::ReadUTF, ReadBuffer - reads binary data from files
ByteBuffer - memcpy_s operations with buffer data
Allocator - memory allocation from managed pools
MemManager - GetMemory, ReleaseMemory operations
Uploads checkpoint files to remote storage - path handling
restoreMeta - deserializes checkpoint metadata from stream

entry_points.justification: JNI entry point - receives BoostConfig object from Java Flink TaskManager. Config contains paths, sizes, and settings from Flink configuration.
entry_points.description: Opens BoostStateDB with configuration from Java layer

entry_points.justification: JNI entry point - receives file paths from Java for restore. Paths come from checkpoint locations which may be on HDFS or local disk controlled by Flink.
entry_points.description: Restores state database from checkpoint paths

entry_points.justification: JNI entry point - receives key/value data from Java Flink operators. Data comes from streaming job processing.
entry_points.description: Puts key-value pair into KV table

entry_points.justification: JNI entry point - receives table name, state type from Java
entry_points.description: Opens state table with given name

entry_points.justification: Reads binary data from checkpoint meta files. Files come from external checkpoint storage (HDFS/S3/local disk).
entry_points.description: Deserializes snapshot operator info from file input view

entry_points.justification: Reads snapshot operator metadata from checkpoint file
entry_points.description: Reads snapshot operator info array from file

entry_points.justification: Restores slice structure from ByteBuffer containing checkpoint data. Buffer filled from file read.
entry_points.description: Restores slice from binary buffer data

entry_points.justification: Reads compressed block data from SST files. Files are checkpoint/snapshot data from external storage.
entry_points.description: Reads and decompresses block from SST file

entry_points.justification: Parses data block header from file buffer
Parses index block entries from file buffer using variable-length encoding
entry_points.description: Gets block index from index block buffer

entry_points.justification: Parses full key structure (stateId, key, seqId, valueType) from file buffer
entry_points.description: Reads internal key structure from file

entry_points.justification: Unpacks LSM key-value info from binary buffer - reads length fields, key data, value data
Reads data from HDFS via JNI. Data comes from remote Hadoop cluster.
Reads data from local file using pread/read syscalls. Files may be checkpoint data.
Decompresses data with srcSize/dstCapacity from file. Size parameters come from file headers.
Reads UTF string length and data from file. Length field read from file (limited to 128KB).
Downloads file from remote HDFS storage for lazy restore
JNI library initialization - called when library is loaded by JVM
Deserializes checkpoint metadata from input stream - reads version, jobID, state descriptors

attack_surfaces: JNI Interface: 25+ JNI entry points receiving data from Java Flink TaskManager
Checkpoint Restore: Binary parsing of snapshot/slice/meta files from external storage
HDFS I/O: File reads from remote Hadoop cluster via JNI bridge
Local File I/O: Reading checkpoint files from local disk
LZ4 Decompression: Decompression of blocks with size parameters from file
Binary Parsing: LsmKeyValueInfo, SliceKey, DataBlock, IndexBlock parsing from file buffers
Variable-length Encoding: VarEncodingUtil::DecodeUnsignedInt reads without strict bounds
ByteBuffer Operations: memcpy_s with buffer data from files

high_risk_modules.reason: Primary attack surface - JNI entry points receive configuration and data from Java layer
Checkpoint restore operations parse untrusted binary data from external files
Core binary parsing utilities - Unpack functions read length/key/value from buffers
Block parsing from SST files - reads index offsets, key counts from buffer headers
HDFS file reading via JNI - data from remote cluster
